title: BIG4 Perth Midland Tourist Park
description: Simple quarters, some with kitchens, in a laid-back hotel offering a BBQ area & an outdoor pool.
address: 6 Toodyay Rd, Middle Swan WA 6056, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set 5 km from wine tasting and concerts at Sandalford Winery, this relaxed hotel is 2 km from Midland train station and 11 km from Caversham Wildlife Park.
 Modest rooms offer flat-screens and minifridges. Upgraded rooms add terraces, microwaves, and tea and coffeemaking facilities. The 1- to 3-bedroom cabins include kitchens, dining tables and living areas. Some feature Wi-Fi access, sofabeds and/or bunk beds.
 Parking is complimentary. Other amenities include an outdoor pool and a BBQ area, as well as a lounge. There are also RV sites. Minimum-stay rules may apply.

title: Karrinyup Waters Resort
description: Unfussy suites & cabins in a laid-back getaway featuring 2 playgrounds, a hot tub & 2 pools.
address: 467 N Beach Rd, Gwelup WA 6018, Australia
hotelDescription:
Off State Route 77, this relaxed resort surrounded by mature trees is 7 km from Trigg Beach, 8 km from the Aquarium of Western Australia and 15 km from Perth city centre.
 Laid-back lodgings, ranging from studio suites to 2-bedroom cabins, feature kitchens, flat-screen TVs and Wi-Fi (fee). Upgraded quarters offer sitting/dining areas. Some cabins feature whirlpool baths and/or bunk beds.
 Amenities include 2 outdoor pools (1 with a kids' section) and a hot tub. There are also caravan and camp sites, plus 2 camp kitchens, coin-operated laundries and 2 playgrounds. Minimum-stay rules may apply.
